semantic.role: Defines a specific naming convention rule for test files.
responsibilities: Enforcing test file suffix convention (.test.ts or .spec.ts)
Maintaining consistency in test file naming across the monorepo
outOfScope: Other file naming conventions (source files, configs, etc.)
General coding standards or style guidelines
Non-test file types or directories outside tests/

English.purpose: To ensure all test files follow a consistent naming pattern for reliable test runner matching.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers contributing to the ArchSpine monorepo, particularly those writing or maintaining test suites. It is a specific rule within a larger set of naming conventions used to enforce codebase consistency.
key_takeaways: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts
The rule applies only to files under the tests/ directory
Violations are treated as errors to guarantee adherence
